name: 811 Dream Different Credit Card

joiningBenefitsValued.label: 500 bonus Reward Points (worth Rs 50) on spending ₹5,000 within the first 45 days of card setup

milestones.label: ₹750 cashback on spending ₹75,000 in a card anniversary year

additionalBenefits: Interest-free cash withdrawals for up to 48 days (subject to ₹100 processing fee)
Credit limit up to 90% of your fixed deposit amount
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between ₹500 and ₹4,000 (max ₹3,500 per year)
Railway surcharge waiver on irctc.co.in and counter bookings (max ₹500 per year)

salaried: Minimum Fixed Deposit backing of Rs 10,000
No income proof or CIBIL score checks required
selfEmployed: Minimum Fixed Deposit backing of Rs 10,000
No income proof or CIBIL score checks required

internalNotes: Redemption rate for vouchers and merchandise is 1 point = Rs 0.10. Cash statement credit rate is 1 point = Rs 0.07. Spends on utility, education, wallet loading, government, insurance, gaming, fuel, and rent do not count towards milestone benefits.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
